text_original: some of my conversation(s) messages has disappeared. Unfortunately it was of the races i made for my book's world. Luckily i have a video record of all ive done.
text_zh: 我的一些对话消息消失了。不幸的是，那是关于我为我书中的世界所创造的种族的内容。幸运的是，我把我所做的一切都录了视频。
reply_original: Hi there, I am truly sorry for the lost messages! I know how important your book's world-building is, and I apologize for this issue. Please email us at support@fantachat.ai with your UID and the character's name so we can investigate and help recover your history. Thank you for your patience!
reply_zh: 你好！对于丢失的消息，我深表歉意。我知道您书中的世界观设定有多么重要，对于出现这个问题我感到非常抱歉。请发送电子邮件至 support@fantachat.ai，并附上您的 UID 和角色名称，以便我们进行调查并帮助恢复您的历史记录。感谢您的耐心等待！
